# Arvela HRIS & Talent Management

Arvela is a comprehensive human capital management (HCM) platform designed for Indonesian modern companies. It integrates recruitment, onboarding, performance (OKR), and learning in one elegant ecosystem.

## Key Modules
- **ATS (Applicant Tracking System)**: Manage job vacancies, candidate assessment, and hiring pipeline.
- **Onboarding**: Automated orientation checklists for new hires.
- **Attendance**: GPS Geofencing and Selfie-based presence.
- **OKR (Performance)**: Quantitative objective and key results tracking.
- **LMS (Learning Management System)**: Internal training portal with certificates.

## Contact Information
- Website: https://arvela.id
- Support: hey.aicareer@gmail.com

## Technology Stack
- Next.js 15
- Supabase (PostgreSQL, Auth, Storage)
- Tailwind CSS
- Mapbox
